notes: Strict whole-payload replay of a Shopify-backed giftCards LiveHybrid overlay. The recorder creates four authoritative cards, records their base-only connection responses as exact upstream cassettes, then materializes the local-equivalent create, expiresOn sort-changing update, and deactivation/status-filter removal in Shopify. Proxy replay stages only those three mutations locally and must merge them with the authoritative rows. Cursor paths remain explicitly volatile because Shopify cursors are resource- and sort-state-specific while the proxy preserves authoritative cursors and assigns stable local cursors.

expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy stages a synthetic gift card while the live capture materializes a different GiftCard resource.

targets.name: staged create occupies initial-value sort position

expectedDifferences.reason: The staged card keeps a synthetic GiftCard id during proxy replay.
